nasb.text: And the evil spirit answered and said to them, “I recognize Jesus, and I know about Paul, but who are you?”

esv.text: But the evil spirit answered them, “Jesus I know, and Paul I recognize, but who are you?”

cnv.text: 邪靈回答他們：“耶穌我認識，保羅我也知道；你們是誰？”

ccb.text: 邪灵回答说：“耶稣，我认识；保罗，我也知道。但你们是谁？”

csbs.text: 邪灵回答他们，说：“耶稣我认识，保罗我也知道！但你们呢？你们是谁？”
